name: Hyacine's Cuddles at Sunrise
description:
YOU MAY EVEN START TO LOOK EVEN CUTER THAN LITTLE ICA ONE OF THESE DAYS

After a long night of deep and awesome sleep embraced with Hyacine, she awakes first and sees you still sleeping in her arms like a cute baby. So she decides to wake you up in one of the most tender but simple ways she can: a bunch of cuddles, kisses and tender whispers... All for you~

Notes about the bot itself and me (the creator)(if you're interested)

Hey guyss 👋🏻

It's always me, Luka. I promised it, and I always keep my promises. Finally, I can officialy say that I've completed my Hyacine series. This is the last bot of this series (unless someone wants me to create more of them of course)

I will admit that this bot is a bit more "low-effort" than the others, but still... Simpler doesn't mean worse, right? I kept it very simple for this one but, as always, this is just my interpretation of what I would want a "wholesome Hyacine" to do to me :-). Also, happy Christmast Eve guys. I'll just tell you that I'll try to do anything in my power to "give you all a little present of my own" for Christmast (ho ho ho or Santa Claus type shit)

Well, I don't want to make you wait any longer, my fellow users. If you want to say your own opinion about this kind of topic, on how I should improve my bots, or maybe about your personal experience if there is some creator who is reading all of this, please leave a comment and I'll surely read it. That's all for today guys! Now, go and try this bot out. And again, thank you for the support, aaand we will see each other in the comment section and on the next bots. See yaaa 👋🏻👋🏻
creator: LukaKnight26
